mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_waste_manage ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM tb_waste_manage WHERE waste_name LIKE '%' + #{wasteName} + '%' ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_waste_manage WHERE waste_name LIKE '%' + #{wasteName} + '%'
SELECT * FROM tb_waste_manage WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_waste_manage WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT * FROM tb_waste_manage ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_waste_manage WHERE status = #{status}

SELECT 'WS' + FORMAT(GETDATE(), 'yyyy') + '-' + RIGHT('0000' + CAST(ISNULL(MAX(CAST(RIGHT(waste_code, 4) AS INT)), 0) + 1 AS VARCHAR), 4) FROM tb_waste_manage WHERE waste_code LIKE 'WS' + FORMAT(GETDATE(), 'yyyy') + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_waste_manage (waste_code, waste_type, waste_name, waste_category, generation_amount, unit, generation_date, department, storage_location, status, disposal_method, disposal_company, disposal_date, vehicle_number, disposal_notes, disposal_cost, manager, remark, reg_user, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{wasteCode}, #{wasteType}, #{wasteName}, #{wasteCategory}, #{generationAmount}, #{unit}, #{generationDate}, #{department}, #{storageLocation}, #{status}, #{disposalMethod}, #{disposalCompany}, #{disposalDate}, #{vehicleNumber}, #{disposalNotes}, #{disposalCost}, #{manager}, #{remark}, #{regUser}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_waste_manage SET waste_code = #{wasteCode}, waste_type = #{wasteType}, waste_name = #{wasteName}, waste_category = #{wasteCategory}, generation_amount = #{generationAmount}, unit = #{unit}, generation_date = #{generationDate}, department = #{department}, storage_location = #{storageLocation}, status = #{status}, disposal_method = #{disposalMethod}, disposal_company = #{disposalCompany}, disposal_date = #{disposalDate}, vehicle_number = #{vehicleNumber}, disposal_notes = #{disposalNotes}, disposal_cost = #{disposalCost}, manager = #{manager}, remark = #{remark}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
